# พักใจ (Phak Jai) — Thai Meditation Directory

> A non-profit platform connecting young Thai generations with verified meditation centers across Thailand.

## About
พักใจ is a curated directory of 50+ meditation centers across Thailand. All listings are free, verified by real practitioners, and designed to help young people discover mental wellness through Buddhist meditation practice.

## Key Pages
- [Temple Directory](https://pakjai.co/): Browse all meditation centers with filters
- [Recommendation Quiz](https://pakjai.co/recommendation.html): 4-question quiz to find the right center

## Content Topics
- Thai meditation centers and retreat information
- Vipassana, Samatha, and mindfulness meditation
- Buddhist practice for beginners and young people
- Mental wellness through meditation (stress relief, burnout, breathing)
- Free meditation programs in Bangkok and Thailand

## Contact
- Non-profit project
- Updated: April 2026
- Language: Thai (primary), English (secondary)
